CorsSettings._comment: Production frontend URL. MUST use HTTPS-only (FR-042, AC2 - US_056). HTTP origins are rejected by CORS configuration.

Hsts._comment: HSTS configuration for production (US_056 - AC2). Max-age: 1 year. Set Preload=true only after adding domain to hstspreload.org.

HttpsRedirection._comment: Production HTTPS redirection. Port 443 is standard HTTPS port. Railway/Render terminate TLS at edge.

_securityNote: All secrets (connection strings, API keys, encryption keys) MUST be set via environment variables. Never commit secrets to source control.
